tagline: Aspiring Data Analyst | Python Learner | Tech Enthusiast
description: Passionate about Python, SQL, Power BI, and data-driven problem solving.

roles.detailed: Data Analytics Learner | Python | SQL | Power BI

bio: I am Irshad N from Kollam, Kerala, India. I am currently learning Data Analytics, Python, SQL, Power BI and GitHub. I am passionate about technology, data analysis, problem solving and building useful projects. My goal is to start a career in Data Analytics and continuously improve my technical skills.

bullets: Learning Python for data analysis, automation, and scripting through hands-on projects and online courses.
Practicing SQL for querying, filtering, aggregating, and managing structured datasets.
Building dashboards and visual reports using Power BI to present data insights clearly.
Using GitHub for version control, project management, and sharing learning projects publicly.
Exploring Excel for data cleaning, pivot tables, formulas, and basic data visualization.
experience.desc: Actively learning Data Analytics tools and techniques including Python, SQL, Power BI, Excel, and GitHub through self-study and project-based practice.
